label: Emporio Italia
rootCause: Ginger Beer Qtd column on the visible invoice prints 24,00 (individual bottles at €0,85 with 5% discount = €19,38). Ground truth expects qty 2 at €9.69/case — same purchase, different unit semantics (2 cases × 12 bottles). When v25 returns qty 24, Pass C performs a column-faithful bottle-count read. When it returns qty 2, Pass C applies case normalization (2 × €9.69 = €19.38). This is GPT run variance on unit interpretation, not pack notation inference from the product name.
firstFailingStageDetail: Error appears at GPT table extraction when run outputs qty=24 @ €0.81 instead of GT qty=2 @ €9.69. Crop, geometry, binder, and reconcile do not change quantity — binder only derives unit_price from total/qty.

pack_multiplier_from_name.evidence: Description is '0.20cl' — no 24, x12, or pack count token. Product code BBB-GINGER33ITA embeds 33 (cl), not 24.

ocr_misread_qty_column.evidence: Visible Qtd column explicitly prints 24,00 (table-data-crop.png, row-ocr-result.json). OCR is not misreading 2 as 24 — the invoice prints 24.

product_name_contamination.evidence: No '24' substring in name. 0.20cl is volume token, not quantity.

adjacent_row_qty_bleed.evidence: De Cecco row above also has qty 24, but Ginger Beer row independently shows 24,00 in its own Qtd cell with matching arithmetic (24×0.85×0.95=19.38).

unit_interpretation_case_vs_bottle.evidence: GT qty 2 @ €9.69 = 2 cases; visible 24,00 @ €0.85 = 24 bottles. €9.69 = 12 × (€0.85 × 0.95) — 12-pack case price. Same €19.38 total, different unit framing.

prompt_rule_variance.evidence: Pass C prompt has Ginger Beer rule (qty 2 NOT 24). Refinement got 2/3; fresh v25 probe 2026-06-12 got 2/3; final VL rerun single shot got 24. GPT sometimes follows prompt case rule, sometimes column-faithful 24.

groundTruth.semanticNote: Catalog case count (2 cx equivalent), not bottle count from Qtd column

smallestFixCategory.recommendation: Strengthen Ginger Beer / Emporio beverage case rule: when Qtd shows bottle count at per-bottle price but line total implies case pricing (qty×unit×(1-discount) = total), prefer case count if total/qty_unit ≈ 12× discounted bottle price. Add explicit worked example with visible 24,00 column → output qty 2 @ €9.69 (NOT column-faithful 24 @ €0.85).
smallestFixCategory.alternative: Revise ground truth to accept qty 24 @ €0.85 as column-faithful correct if VL metrics should match visible invoice literally
notRecommended: Pack parser change for 0.20cl volume token (separate bug)

whenQty24.reason: Line total €19.38 matches in both representations

financialImpact.downstreamVolumeBug: Separate issue: 0.20cl in name → 2ml/bottle usable cost (ginger-beer-audit). Not caused by qty 24 vs 2.
